allowedTransitions.condition: boundary check completed and Draft Only blueprint created
valid sign-off evidence bound to current hashes

rules.name: Allowlist-only transitions
rules.requiredAction: Reject transition and record audit event.

rules.name: Failure routing
rules.requiredAction: Remain blocked until remediated and rechecked.

rules.name: Rejection terminal guard
rules.requiredAction: Create a new request for any renewed proposal.

rules.name: Source or approval expiry
rules.requiredAction: Invalidate permission and repeat compatibility checking and sign-off.

rules.name: Blueprint mutation expiry
rules.requiredAction: Invalidate prior sign-off and return to Review Required.

rules.name: No status skipping
rules.requiredAction: Follow every required lifecycle state in order.
